title: MuteUnFocused
description: Mute game sound when not focused on the game
body:
## **MuteUnFocused**

**Version:** 1.1
**Minecraft:** 1.20.1 - 26.1.2
**Fabric Loader:** 0.15.11+

### **Overview**

**MuteUnFocused** enhances your Minecraft experience by automatically lowering or muting in-game sounds when the game window loses focus. Perfect for multitasking, browsing, or working, ensuring Minecraft's audio doesn't interrupt you when you aren't playing.

### **Features**

- **Automatic Volume Control:**
  Instantly lowers the game volume when you Alt-Tab or minimize the window, and restores it when you return.

- **Configurable Target Volume:**
  Want it silent? Or just quiet background music? You can configure the **Target Volume** (0% - 100%) via the settings menu. Defaults to **0% (Mute)**.

- **Lightweight & Standalone:**
  - **No external dependencies** required!
  - **Mod Menu Integration**: Optional. Install Mod Menu to access the in-game configuration screen.

### **Compatibility**

- **Minecraft Version:**
  - Fully compatible with **1.20.1**, **1.20.x**, **1.21.x**, **26.1+**

- **Fabric Loader:**
  - Requires Fabric Loader **0.15.11+**
